source_pr.title: planner: `ByItem` should filter `NULL` out
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

partially fix https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/10478
and fix https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/10456

### What is changed and how it works?

filter NULL value in planner phase.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Related changes

 - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch (part of codes)

symptoms: sql: "select * from (select *, NULL as xxx from t) t order by xxx", (planner/core/physical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select * from (select *, NULL as xxx from t) t order by xxx", (planner/core/physical_plan_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
